{{Quote|My name is Niklos. I'm the unofficial champion of the Pazaak circuit here on Taris. If you don't mind losing your wager we could play a few hands.|Niklos|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
'''Niklos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who frequented the [[Upper City Cantina]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]], claiming to be the "unofficial champion of the [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] circuit on Taris." He used to have frequent games with fellow player [[Gelrood]], until the latter was banned from the Upper Cantina on suspicion of cheating.

==Biography==
{{Quote|If you ever wish to test yourself against the best Pazaak player on Taris, heh, you know where to find me.|Niklos|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Niklos was a [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] who resided on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a patron of the [[Upper City Cantina]], where he spent his [[Time/Legends|time]] playing [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]]. He used to play against fellow player [[Gelrood]], until the latter was banned from the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on suspicion of cheating. Following this, Niklos was unable to find a rival who could match his skill in the game.<ref name="KotOR" />
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> Former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] and redeemed Jedi [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], who was on Taris in search of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Bastila Shan]], visited the Upper City Cantina and bought a pazaak deck from the retired player [[Garouk]].
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I'm going to enjoy relieving you of your credits almost as much as I'm going to enjoy humiliating you.|Niklos, to Revan|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Niklos was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and fair skin. He had short brown hair and a beard of the same color.

Niklos viewed himself as a pazaak champion. When he won, he claimed it was his skill, but when he lost he would claim that his opponent was simply lucky.
{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
When Revan beat Niklos five times in a row, Niklos accused him of cheating. From then on he continuously called Revan a cheater and refused to play any more pazaak games with him.
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:NiklosKotorXbox.png|thumb|right|150px|The appearance of Niklos in the Xbox version.]]
{{Quote|I do not lose at Pazaak very often, but you have made a habit of beating me. I think it is obvious what that means—you cheat!|Niklos, after losing to Revan several times|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Niklos appeared as a non-playable character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. In the original [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] release of the game, Niklos appears with a different head model that has black hair and blue eyes.

If the player beats Niklos in pazaak five times in a row without losing, he will accuse the player of cheating and will refuse to play pazaak anymore. If [[Mission Vao]] is in your party she will comment on his accusation and call him a sore loser.
